children.name: kisaw-is-a-branding-and-digital-design-studio--we-work-with-brands-as-systems--from-meaning-and-structure-to-visual-identity-and-digital-products--projects-are-handled-by-a-small-team-directly-involved-in-the-process-
children.content:
KISAW is a branding and digital design studio.
We work with brands as systems, from meaning and structure to visual identity and digital products.
Projects are handled by a small team directly involved in the process.

children.name: founded--2025--podgorica--montenegro--number-of-employees--4-products--art-direction--conception--digital-design--graphic-design--visual-identity
children.content:
Founded: 2025 (podgorica, montenegro)
Number of employees: 4
Products: Art Direction, Conception, Digital Design, Graphic Design, Visual Identity

Ivan diachkovCo-founder & Product Designer
i DESIGN END-TO-END PRODUCT EXPERIENCES: APPLICATION FLOWS, CORE PRODUCT PAGES, AND PROMOTIONAL LANDING PAGES. I WORK WITH CUSTOMER JOURNEYS (CJM), USER RESEARCH, AND ITERATION TO IMPROVE CONVERSION, CLARITY, AND BRAND PERCEPTION.
I ALSO BUILD NEW PRODUCTS FROM ZERO TO PRODUCTION-READY RELEASES, SUPPORTING TEAMS FROM EARLY CONCEPT THROUGH LAUNCH AND CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT.

Nika PizhmaCo-founder & Brand Designer

We work with small and medium businesses, experts and cultural projects, creating visual identities, communication systems, brand-led websites, printed matter and merch.

we treat design as both partnership and analysis. Through strategy, narrative and clear visual language, KISAW helps brands define who they are, how they sound and how they appear across digital and physical spaces.
